message:
[bd-36vz] Fix unicode width calculation and panic risks

- bubbles/textarea: Fix padding calculation to use display width instead of char length.
- bubbles/table: Fix string truncation and cell padding to use display width.
- bubbles/list: Fix string truncation to use display width and avoid byte slicing panics.
- glamour: Fix word wrap to use display width.
- huh: Use try_into for usize->u16 casting to prevent truncating casts.
